commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: outfit completeness validation, weather bands fix, Elevate This Look with SerpAPI + Gemini product tiles

Weather tiers refined to 6 bands:
- FREEZING (≤5°C): heavy layers, coat mandatory, boots, scarves
- COLD (6-10°C): jacket/coat mandatory, warm layer, closed shoes
- COOL (11-15°C): light jacket ALWAYS required
- MILD (16-20°C): no coat needed, transitional pieces
- WARM (21-25°C): summer weather, no heavy layers, open shoes OK
- HOT (>25°C): full summer, dresses, linen, sandals

Outfit completeness:
- Prompt explicitly requires TOP+BOTTOM (or DRESS) as mandatory base
- Outerwear only as addition to complete outfit, never standalone
- Existing isValidOutfit() server-side validation enforces this

Elevate This Look — separate second Claude call:
- After outfit generation, asks Claude for 3 complementary accessories
  not already in the outfit
- Each item enriched in parallel: cache check (product_image_cache
  by search_query) → SerpAPI for shop URL/price → Gemini flat-lay
  generation (12s timeout) → cache results for future use
- Returns elevateItems array with ai_flatlay_url, shop_url, price

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: ES-R2 — inject cached DCP into lite structural scores

Lite evaluations now look up the domain's cached DCP (Domain Context
Profile) after validation and apply an aggregate modifier to the
structural channel. This grounds lite structural scores in actual site
behavior (tracker count, security headers, privacy policy) rather than
relying solely on the TQ binary proxy.

Average of all non-null DCP element modifiers, capped at ±0.30 (same
as full eval per-section cap), applied to structural score before
aggregation.

Source: psychology-agent recommendation ES-R2, independently verified
by unratified-agent.

commit.message:
fix(ipad): resolve infinite re-render loop (React error #185)

The root cause of iPad drawing not working was React error #185
(Maximum update depth exceeded) — an infinite re-render loop that
crashed the Excalidraw component before it could process touch input.

The loop was caused by inline function/object props passed to
Excalidraw that created new references on every render:
- excalidrawAPI={(api) => setExcalidrawAPI(api)} — new fn each render
- initialData={{...}} — new object each render
- UIOptions={{...}} — new object each render

On iPad, Excalidraw switches to mobile mode internally, triggering
additional re-renders that amplified the unstable prop references into
a full infinite loop (50+ nested updates).

Fix: memoize all Excalidraw props with useCallback/useMemo:
- handleExcalidrawAPI via useCallback([])
- initialData via useMemo with proper deps
- uiOptions via useMemo([])

Also fixed the /ipad-test page with the same memoization pattern and
improved event logging to show element tagName for better debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent forgot-password from crashing when SMTP is unavailable

consistent with not revealing whether an email exists.

- Remove length penalty for words
- Use word frequency from wordfreq package for weighting word selection

Changes:
- storage.find_words_with_digraphs(): Add common_only and zipf_threshold params
- storage.get_random_words_with_digraphs(): Add common_only and zipf_threshold params
- storage.get_random_words_with_equal_digraphs(): Add common_only and zipf_threshold params
- storage._calculate_frequency_weights(): New method for frequency-based weighting
- main.fetch_digraph_words(): Pass common_only and zipf_threshold to storage methods
- main.fetch_digraph_practice(): Pass common_only and zipf_threshold to storage methods

  checks every hour after 30s startup delay

  (programmatic TrayIconBuilder in tray.rs is the single source)

  reduced window from 500x760 to 380x520

  (broken relative import when copied to ~/.trapezohe/)

  without requiring npm install

- Bump version to 0.1.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix search dropdown width when typing before search bar finishes expanding

Reposition dropdown on every show call and after the expand transition
completes, so it always matches the current search bar width.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: increase serverless DB pool from 1 to 3 connections

max: 1 caused head-of-line blocking under concurrent requests — each
request queued behind the previous one's DB query. With max: 3, up to
3 queries run in parallel per warm instance, eliminating the timeout
cascade that hit /api/talent-owner/jobs under load.

Also raised connect_timeout to 15s so it exceeds the 8s app-level
timeout, ensuring the app timeout fires first with a clean 503.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement SPEC-004: security, stability, test & CI improvements

Phase 1 - Security & Stability (16 items):
- Add try-catch to all IPC handlers with typed error messages
- Add app.whenReady() error handling, remove unused imports
- Add path validation for file:saveToPath
- Add JSON.parse error handling for credentials/token files
- Resolve outputDir and pre-create image directories
- Close HTTP server on error in Google auth flow
- Fix err:any → instanceof Error pattern across frontend
- Add try-catch to SlotCard drag-drop JSON.parse
- Add isScanning loading state to Header buttons
- Remove non-null assertions in store moveFile
- Improve React key uniqueness in SlotCard
- Add filename sanitization in FileOperations
- Replace any types with OAuth2Client, DriveFileMetadata, etc.
- Replace classList DOM manipulation with React state

Phase 2 - Test & CI (5 items):
- Add test step to CI workflow
- Configure vitest v8 coverage
- Add converter unit tests (7 tests)
- Add fileService classifySlot tests (15 tests)
- Remove unimplemented toolbar buttons

82 tests passing, tsc clean, build successful.

v1.113: Add Era documentation structure

Restructure game documentation to reflect the upcoming Era system.
Everything currently in the game is Era 1 (Dawn); Eras 2 (Dusk) and
3 (Midnight) are placeholders to be filled in as those mechanics are
designed.

Changes:
- Impetus v5.md: trimmed to a high-level overview of the game and Era
  structure; now links to per-Era documents split by player/developer
  audience
- Era 1.md (new): player-facing rules for Era 1, rewritten in
  natural prose with no implementation references
- Era 1 Technical.md (new): full developer/AI reference — data
  structures, phase machine, all server methods, protocol message
  table, sub-phase strings, client networking model, game_scene
  pipeline, animation system, change tracker, UI renderer API, and key
  invariants
- Era 2.md / Era 3.md (new): player-facing placeholders
- Era 2 Technical.md / Era 3 Technical.md (new): developer-facing
  placeholder templates for implementation deltas from the previous Era

commit.message:
feat(delegation-guard): unblocked tools + message audit [1.2.0] (#190)

Add 'unblocked_tools' category (Read, Glob, Grep) that skip the hard block but count toward the advisory streak. Configurable per-project via .claude/delegation-guard.json.

Rewrite all hook messages based on collaborative audit: hard block is now a nudge with retry hint; streak=1 has a distinct message for unblocked tools; advisories use a unified template with escalating label (reminder -> advisory -> warning -> CRITICAL); schedule changed from powers-of-2 to Fibonacci (2,3,5,8,13,21...); tool references updated from Task to Agent.

commit.message:
Add search, fix video playback issues, and improve UX

- Add toolbar search for photos and folders (SearchResultsView)
- Fix audio pops: move renderFrame off CVDisplayLink real-time thread to
  user-interactive renderQueue, preventing CoreAudio thread starvation
- Fix double-space-to-play: defer setPause when AVPlayer not yet created,
  apply pending state after async player initialization
- Auto-dismiss status bar messages after 10 seconds (finish/finishGlobal)
- Delete fallback: try trashItem first, fall back to removeItem for
  volumes without a trash can (e.g. network drives)
- Update DESIGN.md with new features and architecture changes

commit.message:
feat: add OurSMS OTP delivery and open-source location features

- Wire OurSMS (oursms.com) as SMS gateway for OTP delivery;
  SMSService gracefully skips send when credentials not configured
- OTPService.send() now accepts phone param and calls SMSService
- Add LocationService with Nominatim geocoding, reverse geocoding,
  and pure-Python Haversine distance calculation (no Google Maps key)
- Add GET /items/nearby endpoint (declared before /{item_id} to avoid
  UUID coercion) with bounding-box pre-filter + Haversine refinement
- Add GET /geocode/reverse and POST /geocode/search endpoints
- NearbyItemResponse schema extends ItemResponse with distance_km
- ItemRepository.list_near() bounding-box SQL query with 4x over-fetch
- Add OURSMS_APP_SID / OURSMS_APP_SECRET / OURSMS_SENDER_ID to config
- 16 new tests (test_sms.py, test_location.py); all 43 tests passing
- Update client docs: Pineal Developers, PM Ahmed Bashir Ali,
  SMS + Location line items ($900), revised total $16,400
